sql: SELECT department, COUNT(*) as user_count, SUM(amount) as total_amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.status = #{status} AND o.created_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount} HAVING SUM(amount) >= #{minAmount}
templateSql:
SELECT department, COUNT(*) as user_count, SUM(amount) as total_amount
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND u.status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="startDate != null">
        AND o.created_at >= #{startDate}
    </if>
</where>
GROUP BY department
<if test="minCount != null">
    HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount}
</if>
<if test="minAmount != null">
    HAVING SUM(amount) >= #{minAmount}
</if>
